scriptLines:
source(
    allowSchemaDrift: true,
    validateSchema: false,
    output(
        CONTACT_NUMBER as string,
        PERSON_FIRST_NAME as string,
        PERSON_MIDDLE_NAME as string,
        PERSON_LAST_NAME as string,
        JOB_TITLE as string,
        DEPARTMENT as string,
        MOBILE_PHONE as string,
        WORK_PHONE as string,
        LAND_PHONE as string,
        PRIMARY_MOBILE_PHONE as string,
        BUSSINESS_EMAIL as string,
        ASSISTANT_EMAIL as string,
        PERSONAL_EMAIL as string,
        PRIMARY_BUSSINESS_EMAIL as string,
        START_DATE as string,
        END_DATE as string,
        PREFERRED_CONTACT_METHOD as string,
        STATUS as string
    ),
    format: 'parquet'
) ~> srcStaged

srcStaged derive(
    opx_contactnumber = toString(CONTACT_NUMBER),
    firstname = toString(PERSON_FIRST_NAME),
    middlename = toString(PERSON_MIDDLE_NAME),
    lastname = toString(PERSON_LAST_NAME),
    jobtitle = toString(JOB_TITLE),
    department = toString(DEPARTMENT),
    mobilephone = toString(MOBILE_PHONE),
    telephone1 = toString(WORK_PHONE),
    telephone2 = toString(LAND_PHONE),
    opx_primaryphonetype = case(equals(PRIMARY_MOBILE_PHONE, 'Y'), 884870000, equals(PRIMARY_WORK_PHONE, 'Y'), 884870001, equals(PRIMARY_LAND_PHONE, 'Y'), 884870002, null()),
    emailaddress1 = toString(BUSSINESS_EMAIL),
    emailaddress2 = toString(ASSISTANT_EMAIL),
    emailaddress3 = toString(PERSONAL_EMAIL),
    opx_primaryemailtype = case(equals(PRIMARY_BUSSINESS_EMAIL, 'Y'), 884870000, equals(PRIMARY_ASSISTANT_EMAIL, 'Y'), 884870001, equals(PRIMARY_PERSONAL_EMAIL, 'Y'), 884870002, null()),
    opx_startdate = toTimestamp(START_DATE, 'yyyy-MM-dd'),
    opx_enddate = toTimestamp(END_DATE, 'yyyy-MM-dd'),
    preferredcontactmethodcode = case(equals(case(equals(lower(trim(PREFERRED_CONTACT_METHOD)), 'any'), 'Any', equals(lower(trim(PREFERRED_CONTACT_METHOD)), 'email'), 'Email', equals(lower(trim(PREFERRED_CONTACT_METHOD)), 'phone'), 'Phone', equals(lower(trim(PREFERRED_CONTACT_METHOD)), 'fax'), 'Fax', equals(lower(trim(PREFERRED_CONTACT_METHOD)), 'mail'), 'Mail', lower(trim(PREFERRED_CONTACT_METHOD))), 'Any'), 1, equals(case(equals(lower(trim(PREFERRED_CONTACT_METHOD)), 'any'), 'Any', equals(lower(trim(PREFERRED_CONTACT_METHOD)), 'email'), 'Email', equals(lower(trim(PREFERRED_CONTACT_METHOD)), 'phone'), 'Phone', equals(lower(trim(PREFERRED_CONTACT_METHOD)), 'fax'), 'Fax', equals(lower(trim(PREFERRED_CONTACT_METHOD)), 'mail'), 'Mail', lower(trim(PREFERRED_CONTACT_METHOD))), 'Email'), 2, equals(case(equals(lower(trim(PREFERRED_CONTACT_METHOD)), 'any'), 'Any', equals(lower(trim(PREFERRED_CONTACT_METHOD)), 'email'), 'Email', equals(lower(trim(PREFERRED_CONTACT_METHOD)), 'phone'), 'Phone', equals(lower(trim(PREFERRED_CONTACT_METHOD)), 'fax'), 'Fax', equals(lower(trim(PREFERRED_CONTACT_METHOD)), 'mail'), 'Mail', lower(trim(PREFERRED_CONTACT_METHOD))), 'Phone'), 3, equals(case(equals(lower(trim(PREFERRED_CONTACT_METHOD)), 'any'), 'Any', equals(lower(trim(PREFERRED_CONTACT_METHOD)), 'email'), 'Email', equals(lower(trim(PREFERRED_CONTACT_METHOD)), 'phone'), 'Phone', equals(lower(trim(PREFERRED_CONTACT_METHOD)), 'fax'), 'Fax', equals(lower(trim(PREFERRED_CONTACT_METHOD)), 'mail'), 'Mail', lower(trim(PREFERRED_CONTACT_METHOD))), 'Fax'), 4, equals(case(equals(lower(trim(PREFERRED_CONTACT_METHOD)), 'any'), 'Any', equals(lower(trim(PREFERRED_CONTACT_METHOD)), 'email'), 'Email', equals(lower(trim(PREFERRED_CONTACT_METHOD)), 'phone'), 'Phone', equals(lower(trim(PREFERRED_CONTACT_METHOD)), 'fax'), 'Fax', equals(lower(trim(PREFERRED_CONTACT_METHOD)), 'mail'), 'Mail', lower(trim(PREFERRED_CONTACT_METHOD))), 'Mail'), 5, 1),
    statecode = case(equals(STATUS, 'A'), 0, equals(STATUS, 'I'), 1, 0)
) ~> dc_1

dc_2 split(
    __row_valid == true(),
    disjoint: false
) ~> cs_1@(valid)

cs_1@valid sink(
    allowSchemaDrift: true,
    validateSchema: false,
    format: 'parquet',
    skipDuplicateMapInputs: true,
    skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true,
    errorHandlingOption: 'stopOnFirstError'
) ~> sinkFinal

cs_1 sink(
    allowSchemaDrift: true,
    validateSchema: false,
    format: 'parquet',
    skipDuplicateMapInputs: true,
    skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true,
    errorHandlingOption: 'stopOnFirstError'
) ~> sinkTransformErrors
